summary: Planned conservative non-mutating classifications for the five live PR inventory candidates. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or security-routing action is recommended.

actions.reason: Standalone third-party provider docs PR with failed proof and low-signal labels; keep open for maintainer/docs judgment rather than closing in this plan shard.
The PR appears to be the linked implementation path for #90713, but this plan job cannot merge or close follow-up issues.
Focused but still review-sensitive message-delivery PR with unresolved bot review concerns; keep as an independent open PR.
Maintainer-owned P1 availability/message-delivery change with active maintainer signal and proof-state ambiguity; leave the exact technical correctness/proof decision to a maintainer.
Useful linked fix candidate for #84575, but it is waiting on author/rebase and cannot be repaired or merged in this plan-mode inventory job.

needs_human: #90908 requires maintainer judgment on proof sufficiency and technical correctness because it is maintainer-owned, assigned, P1, and has active maintainer re-review signal.
